purpose: Three small time-formatting helpers used across panels and cards: formatElapsed (since-start in 'Hh Mm' or 'Mm Ss'), formatTime (HH:MM:SS), calcDuration (between two timestamps in 'Mm Ss' or 'Ss').
gotchas: formatElapsed uses Date.now() — calling repeatedly during a render does NOT auto-refresh; components must rerender on a tick to update.
All three swallow invalid date inputs by relying on Math.max(0, ...) and NaN→0 implicit coercion in arithmetic — output will be '0s' or 'NaNm NaNs' depending on path.
formatTime uses local timezone (getHours/getMinutes/getSeconds) — server-rendered timestamps look different across timezones.
patterns: Pure functions — no React, no state — usable inside render loops freely.
conventions: Time inputs are ISO strings; outputs are display strings.
Switch from 'Hh Mm' to 'Mm Ss' format triggered when hours > 0 or minutes > 0 respectively.
